sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114110" key="xlamudouryo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλᾰμῠδουρψ-ός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114110.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maker of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χλαμύδες,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:159" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.159</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
